course.title: Python for Data Science and ML
course.description: Master Python and apply it to data science, visualization, and machine learning projects.

course.title: Full Stack Web Development
course.description: Build complete web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.

course.title: Machine Learning A-Z
course.description: Comprehensive machine learning course covering supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

course.title: Data Analytics with Power BI
course.description: Build interactive dashboards and reports using Microsoft Power BI for business intelligence.

course.title: UI/UX Design with Figma
course.description: Design beautiful, user-centric interfaces using Figma from wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes.

course.title: React.js Zero to Pro
course.description: Master React.js including hooks, context API, Redux, and building production-ready applications.

course.title: Java and OOP Fundamentals
course.description: Learn Java from scratch with a strong emphasis on object-oriented programming principles.

course.title: Deep Learning with TensorFlow
course.description: Build neural networks and deep learning models using TensorFlow and Keras.

course.title: SQL and Database Design
course.description: Learn SQL from beginner to advanced, including database design, joins, and stored procedures.
